llii1l1i={n=13,J=19,O=42;i=51;D=18;m=61;["\056"]=23;B=2;V=10;t=22;z=35,f=36;a=60;l=30;["\052"]=44,v=3;p=46;N=58;L=0;F=1;Q=56,["\047"]=63;["\057"]=16;["\049"]=20;A=39,T=4,k=47;W=24;Y=28;S=34;u=52,C=26;g=45;["\048"]=49;b=41,I=8,R=48;U=55;["\043"]=6,o=38,w=29;y=17,E=11;r=14;h=54,q=5,K=15,e=21;["\051"]=12;x=33,["\053"]=62;H=27;c=32;["\055"]=50,["\050"]=40,Z=53;j=57;G=37,X=25,["\054"]=43;d=59,P=31,M=9,s=7}local return(function(Iliii1ii,IillIlII,li1l11ll,Il11li1i,lll1lIII,IIl11Ili,lIi1illi,l11il1lI,lilIIIlI,lli1l1II,lllI1l1i,IlllI1ll,IilIIiIl,IIiI1l1i,lIi11iII,lIlII1il,IiilI11l,l1iliiIi,I1lll1li,Iliil1I1,I1il1IIi,lii1lllI,l1l1I11i,IIllll1l)lllI1l1i,IIiI1l1i,I1il1IIi,lli1l1II,l1l1I11i,IiilI11l,lilIIIlI,I1lll1li,IlllI1ll,Iliil1I1,l1iliiIi,lIi11iII,l11il1lI,IIllll1l,lii1lllI,lIlII1il,IilIIiIl=function(I111IiIl,lI11lIIi)local end,function(IlI11lii)l1iliiIi[IlI11lii]=l1iliiIi[IlI11lii]-1 if l1iliiIi[IlI11lii]==0 then l1iliiIi[IlI11lii],I1il1IIi[IlI11lii]=nil,nil end end,{},function(I1l1IlII)local IiIIIl1I=Iliil1I1(l1I1llIi)local liiIlil1=function(II11l111,l1I1I1iI,IiIiII1i,lil1lIil,Ill1i11l,lll1IiIi)return l11il1lI(IiiiI1lI,{II11l111;l1I1I1iI,IiIiII1i;lil1lIil;Ill1i11l;lll1IiIi},l1I1llIi,IiIIIl1I)end return liiIlil1 end,function(II1iliil,lI1iil1i)local IilliilI=Iliil1I1(lI1iil1i)local IiillI11=lIlII1il(569873,{lI11Iiii;IIIiIIIl})I1il1IIi[I11I1i1i]=IiillI11 IiillI11=l1l1I11i(2366536,{lI11Iiii,Ili1IiI1})I1il1IIi[l11IiI1l]=IiillI11 and 16087019 or 757783 else IIIiIIIl=I1il1IIi[Iiil1lIi[4]]Il11III1=IIIiIIIl IiillI11=IIIiIIIl and 5845682 or 1864249 end else if IiillI11<1176539 then IiillI11=Il11III1 and 6763726 or 686612 else
